label: Meta-learning

node.label: Meta-learning
node.definition: Models learn how to adapt, optimize, or infer quickly across tasks rather than mastering only one task.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Meta-learning is to connect Supervised learning, Optimization theory to downstream capabilities including In-context & test-time learning, AutoML & automated model design.
examples: substrate for AutoML & automated model design
limitations: The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Supervised learning, Optimization theory.

dependencies.rationale: Meta-learning follows the learning setup expressed by Supervised learning.
Meta-learning uses Optimization theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Meta-learning uses Probability theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
